name: foreman
description: Prompt-engineering and project-roadmap plugin. /foreman:craft-prompt builds self-contained Anthropic-grade prompts. /foreman:init bootstraps a project's ROADMAP.jsonl and its Claude-suggestion policy. /foreman:roadmap picks the next task like an architect (top 3, ranked, one marked Recommended) and crafts its handoff prompt. /foreman:survey ground-truths the near-term candidates against the actual codebase, on demand, and persists any real finding back into the roadmap. /foreman:toggle-discovery flips the commit hook's discovery policy on or off without re-running init. An opt-in, commit-triggered hook keeps roadmap status in sync; a second hook blocks direct edits to ROADMAP.jsonl, forcing changes through the CLI; a third reruns Foreman's own test suite after an edit to its scripts/hooks and flags a regression immediately.
